hooks.command: f=$(jq -r "(.tool_input.file_path) // empty"); case "$f" in */src/*.js) out=$(npx eslint "$f" 2>&1) || { printf "ESLint found issues in %s:\n%s\n" "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac

f=$(jq -r "(.tool_input.file_path) // empty"); case "$f" in */src/core/schema/options.js) printf "Option schema changed — if you added/renamed/changed an option, verify all three (see .claude/rules/options-changes.md):
  1) OptionProvider.reset() handling (src/core/config/optionProvider.js)
  2) OPTION_FIXED_FLAG (global) | OPTION_FRAME_FIXED_FLAG (per-frame)
  3) typedef @property, then: npm run ts-build
" >&2; exit 2;; esac
